title: Login issue after password reset
description: Customer cannot log in even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment deducted but order not confirmed
description: Amount was deducted but no order confirmation received.

title: Website loading very slow
description: Homepage takes too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: Error appears while uploading profile image.

title: Incorrect discount applied
description: Promo code applied but wrong discount percentage given.

title: App crashes on checkout
description: Mobile app crashes during checkout process.

title: Order delivered late
description: Customer received order 3 days later than expected date.

title: Refund not processed
description: Refund request approved but money not returned yet.

title: Account verification email not received
description: Customer did not receive verification email after signup.

title: Error 500 on dashboard
description: Internal server error appears while accessing dashboard.

title: Cannot change password
description: Password update form not submitting properly.

title: Product image not displaying
description: Images are broken on product details page.

title: Multiple charges for single order
description: Customer charged twice for the same order.

title: Search feature not working
description: Search results not showing relevant products.
